description:
Fourth subticket. Depends on .18.3.

`import Mod` pulls Mod's fns/macros into the current module's local namespace. `import Mod, only: [f: 1, g: 2]` selective. `import Mod, except: [...]` symmetric.

## Scope

- Parser: top-of-module `import <Path> [, only: [...] | except: [...]]`.
- AST: Item::Import { path, only/except }.
- Resolution: extend per-module name-binding so `f(x)` inside the importing module resolves to `Mod.f` when imported.
- Conflict rule: a local fn shadows imports; explicit `Mod.f` always wins.

## Tests

- Plain import of a single fn.
- only:[] selective.
- Local fn overrides import; ambiguous import errors.
title: import
